ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "nhd_num" INTEGER /* NHD number assigned to the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the neighborhood was officially recognized */,
  "geographic_code" TEXT /* Unique geographic code for the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the demographics belong to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Number of white individuals in the neighborhood */,
  "native" INTEGER /* Number of native individuals in the neighborhood */,
  "native_pc" REAL /* Percentage of native individuals in the neighborhood */,
  "mixed" INTEGER /* Number of mixed individuals in the neighborhood */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Number of black individuals in the neighborhood */,
  "asian" INTEGER /* Number of Asian individuals in the neighborhood */,
  "others" INTEGER /* Number of individuals from other ethnicities in the neighborhood */,
  "hispanic" INTEGER /* Number of Hispanic individuals in the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing age distribution */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing gender distribution */,
  "education_levels" TEXT /* JSON object representing education levels */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the housing data belongs to */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the neighborhood */,
  "occupied" INTEGER /* Number of occupied households in the neighborhood */,
  "livability" REAL /* Livability score for the neighborhood */,
  "livability_index" REAL /* Livability index for the neighborhood */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of vacant households */,
  "average_house_size" REAL /* Average size of houses in square feet */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median value of homes in the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the housing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the income data belongs to */,
  "per_capita" INTEGER /* Per capita income for the neighborhood */,
  "median_household" INTEGER /* Median household income for the neighborhood */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini coefficient indicating income inequality */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the income data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the employment data belongs to */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the neighborhood */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "median_wage" INTEGER /* Median wage for employed individuals */,
  "job_sectors" TEXT /* JSON object representing the distribution of jobs across different sectors */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
